title: ゴルシの！いきなり過去編！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Famished after work, I head over to the shopping
district to grab a bite to eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, I find a promising hole-in-the-wall
ramen shop. I step inside, only to find a familiar
face.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Welcome! C'mon in!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Trainer! Finished for the day? Good for
you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see, the ramen broth slumbering in my
veins suddenly awoke with a vengeance...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was overcome with a burning desire to craft
delicious ramen... so I got myself a part-time gig
here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here, feel free to snack on some appetizers...
while I tell you a tale of the past.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...It was a freezing winter day.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was out on the streets, selling metal bats in
order to support my folks' screw production
factory.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But it was just so cold that day. The bitter chill
seeped into my very bones, freezing me to the
core.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All I could do was weep all by my lonesome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I swallow the incredulous questions bubbling up
about the story's setting and quietly continue
listening.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's when an Umamusume appeared before me
and changed my life forever.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right. From what I could tell, she was
probably a few years older than me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Without saying a word, she held out a bowl of
piping hot ramen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her story seems too outlandish to believe, but
Gold Ship keeps talking with utmost sincerity.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I thanked her once I thawed out, but she looked
at me with a hint of sadness.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
She said, "I'm an Umamusume, but I'm not good
at running."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"That's why I want to open my own ramen shop.
You should choose the future that's right for you
too."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Those words shook my entire world... I mean, until
then, nobody'd ever told me I could make my own
life decisions.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's when I realized my future wasn't shackled
to my family's screw production factory. I could
do what was right for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a strange story to wrap my head around, but I
still find it touching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that she shook off the circumstances of
her birth to create her own path in life... It's
inspiring.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Sorry for talking your ear off.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But you'd get all fired up to make some ramen
too if that memory came back to you, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what that Umamusume is up to now. I'd
love to see her again, but I haven't got a clue how
to find her...
choice_data_list: Why not try recreating her soup?
How about going back to where you met?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Recreate her soup? I don't even know if I can...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I can't quit before I try! I've grown up since
then, so I bet I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That settles it! If I remember right, it had enough
garlic in it to off an elephant!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And... done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's masterpiece is a garlic lover's dream...
In fact, there's more garlic in it than noodles and
broth combined!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah, I've nailed it! This garlicky,
sinus-obliterating aroma sure takes me back!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here, you can have some too! All right, down the
hatch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Together, we taste the freshly made ramen...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It burns! It buuurns! My tongue! It's on fiiiiire!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The garlic is so overwhelming, it's inedible!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh, now that I think of it, garlic's supposed to
promote blood flow, right? I guess that's why it
warms your body up...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Maybe I only liked it because I was literally frozen that day... Nobody'd want to sit down and eat this normally! Cough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Gold Ship isn't any closer to tracking
down that Umamusume, she sure got one garlicky
blast from the past...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, just when I thought I'd forgotten that
little episode, something strange happens.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You mean, back to that fateful riverside lane?
...Yeah, okay. It's probably worth a shot.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's literally not a soul around. Welp,
makes sense, considering it's night.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh well. No point in sticking around. Let's call it a
day and—huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! Suzuka?! Is that you?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um? Well, yes...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait, wait! Don't tell me you were the Umamusume I met all those years ago!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't just let you go now that I know who you
are! You're comin' with me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eep! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't you go running away from me now! Let's
take a stroll down memory lane!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to Gold Ship's story, the Umamusume
who saved her was apparently a few years older
than her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, even assuming this mystery
savior really exists, Silence Suzuka is an unlikely
candidate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, just when I thought I'd forgotten that
little episode, something strange happens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I sift through a stack of fan mail, one
particular letter catches my eye. I can't help but
read it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"It seems you've been living life on your own
terms ever since the day we met. I'll continue to
watch over you as you forge your own path."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...That's it. There's no name to be found on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Does this mean the Umamusume in Gold Ship's
story actually exists?
